anchorTextRules: Vary anchor text (don't repeat exact phrases)
Keep anchor text concise (2-5 words ideal)
Match anchor text to target page's primary keyword
placementGuidelines: Breadcrumbs: Always link to parent category and homepage
Below Tool: 'Try These Next' section with 3 related tools
FAQ Section: Natural mentions only (1-2 links max)
Footer: Standard site navigation (not counted as internal links)
avoidOverLinking: Don't link same URL multiple times on one page
Use nofollow for less important links if needed
Focus on user journey, not just SEO
crossCategoryStrategy: Link document preparation tools (PDF + image + text)
Connect developer tools with text formatting
Use 'Related Tools' sections for cross-category links
